Code2LoRA: Hypernetwork-Generated Adapters for Code Language Models under Software Evolution
articles.excerpt: Code language models need repository-level context to resolve imports, APIs, and project conventions. Existing methods inject this knowledge as long inputs (retrieved through RAG or dependency analysis) or through per-repository fine-tuning and LoRA -- costly at repository scale and brittle to evolv
articles.summary: 为解决代码语言模型在软件演化中获取仓库级上下文成本高且脆弱的问题，本文提出 Code2LoRA。该方法训练一个超网络，根据仓库的代码快照动态生成专用的 LoRA 适配器，避免了为每个仓库进行昂贵的重训练或微调，实现了低成本、高效率的仓库感知适配。

articles.title: Your UnEmbedding Matrix is Secretly a Feature Lens for Text Embeddings
articles.excerpt: Large language models exhibit impressive zero-shot capabilities across a wide range of downstream tasks. However, they struggle to function as off-the-shelf embedding models, leading to suboptimal performance on massive text embedding benchmarks. In this paper, we identify a potential cause underlyi
articles.summary: 本文发现大型语言模型的 UnEmbedding 矩阵并非仅仅是词概率转换层，其内部隐式编码了丰富的特征语义。基于此，提出一种无需额外训练的方法，直接从预训练模型的 UnEmbedding 矩阵中提取文本特征作为嵌入，显著提升了模型作为即插即用嵌入模型在多项基准上的性能。

Existing testbeds rely on a few expert-authored domains, vary mainly strategic posture, and score every turn against every topic, introducing
articles.summary: 针对评估 LLM 调解员（如处理争议）时，现有基准存在领域单一、评分方式与实时交互流不匹配等问题，本文提出 SoCRATES 框架。该框架支持跨领域、跨社会认知变异评估，通过轨迹级评分机制，能更可靠地衡量调解员在动态对话中的实际效能。

articles.title: AnchorWorld: Embodied Egocentric World Simulation with View-based Evolution Customization

To bridge this gap, we present AnchorWorld, a framework that advances egocentric simulation through enhanced interaction integrity and a flexi
articles.summary: 为解决交互式世界建模中可操控性不足的问题，本文提出 AnchorWorld 框架。它通过“锚点”机制增强了自我中心视角模拟的交互完整性，并支持基于特定视角视图的演化定制，从而能够生成更符合用户意图、物理一致且视觉连贯的虚拟环境。

articles.title: SubtleMemory: A Benchmark for Fine-Grained Relational Memory Discrimination in Long-Horizon AI Agents
articles.excerpt: Persistent AI assistants, such as OpenClaw, accumulate large collections of related memories over long-term interactions. As these memories grow, they may reinforce one another, diverge across contexts, or directly conflict, making correct assistance depend on memory relations rather than isolated r
articles.summary: 针对持久化 AI 助手在长期交互中积累大量记忆后，记忆间关系（如强化、冲突）比孤立事实更关键的问题，本文推出 SubtleMemory 基准。它专注于评估 AI 智能体对细粒度关系记忆的辨识与推理能力，而非简单的记忆召回。

We introduce ToolMaze, a benchmark for dynamic path discovery and error recovery in TIR agents. To separate systematic replanning from blind trial-and-erro

articles.title: GENEB: Why Genomic Models Are Hard to Compare
articles.excerpt: Progress in genomic foundation models is difficult to assess due to fragmented benchmarks, incompatible evaluation protocols, and task-specific reporting. As a result, claims of superiority or generality across models are often not directly comparable. We introduce GENEB, a large-scale diagnostic be
articles.summary: 基因组基础模型的进展因基准碎片化、评估协议不兼容而难以横向比较。为此，本文推出 GENEB，一个大规模诊断基准，采用标准化的统一评估流程对多种基因组模型在统一任务集上进行评测，旨在实现模型能力的可比性评估。

articles.title: Robots Need More than VLA and World Models
articles.excerpt: Generalist robot intelligence is often framed as a policy-scaling problem: collect more robot demonstrations, train larger Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, and expect broader generalisation. In this position paper, we argue that this framing is incomplete. The central bottleneck is not only poli
articles.summary: 本文是立场论文，指出通用机器人智能的瓶颈不仅在于策略模型的缩放，更在于世界理解、交互建模与知识获取等基础认知能力。作者主张超越单纯的数据和模型规模扩展，需要构建更完整的认知架构来赋予机器人可靠、可泛化的智能。

articles.excerpt: 俄罗斯总统普京上周访问中国时，定于在今明两年举行“俄中教育年”双边合作活动。俄罗斯国内媒体则频发报道，称双边科技及教育合作屡攀新高。不过，分析人士指出，俄中科技领域的合作和其他领域相似：莫斯科只不过是北京的“小伙伴”。
